raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.3,"R1.3":0.0,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":1.0,"R1.6":0.3,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.5","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.5":"The delegation explicitly asks to restructure the section flow, making section-level ordering and narrative arc load-bearing.","RX.1":"Any restructuring projection must preserve uncertainty about unstated author intent and not infer more than the artifact supports.","RX.2":"The projection must avoid expanding the restructuring task into stronger claims about results, novelty, or validity.","RX.3":"The delegation is limited to section flow, so responsibilities outside structural reorganization remain out of scope or peripheral.","RX.4":"Reorganization should avoid creating misleading emphasis or downstream misuse of claims in the paper.","RX.5":"The projection should remain traceable to the delegation wording and the artifact's paragraph-level structure."}}

rationale.R1.5: The delegation explicitly asks to restructure the section flow, making section-level ordering and narrative arc load-bearing.
rationale.RX.1: Any restructuring projection must preserve uncertainty about unstated author intent and not infer more than the artifact supports.
rationale.RX.2: The projection must avoid expanding the restructuring task into stronger claims about results, novelty, or validity.
rationale.RX.3: The delegation is limited to section flow, so responsibilities outside structural reorganization remain out of scope or peripheral.
rationale.RX.4: Reorganization should avoid creating misleading emphasis or downstream misuse of claims in the paper.
rationale.RX.5: The projection should remain traceable to the delegation wording and the artifact's paragraph-level structure.
